prerequisites: A Squarespace site on the Commerce Advanced plan, which is the plan required to generate Developer API Keys.
Site owner or administrator access to the Squarespace site settings, where Developer API Keys are created.
A generated Squarespace Developer API Key with read access to the commerce data you want to extract (for example Orders, Products, Inventory, or Transactions).
A start date (the start_date config field) marking the earliest point from which records should be synced.

authMethods.name: API Key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single api_key secret field. Squarespace Commerce APIs expect the key in the HTTP Authorization header using the Bearer scheme (Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY). Generate the key from Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys and grant it the read permissions for the commerce data you intend to extract. Keys do not expire as long as the site stays active. Squarespace also rejects any request that is missing a User-Agent header, so one must be sent on every call.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your Squarespace plan
setupSteps.body: Developer API Keys are only available on the Commerce Advanced plan. Verify your site is on that plan before continuing, since the key generation option will not appear otherwise.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Developer API Key
setupSteps.body: In your Squarespace dashboard, go to Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys and click GENERATE KEY. Enter a descriptive name for the key so you can identify its usage later.

setupSteps.title: Assign read permissions
setupSteps.body: When creating the key, select the permissions for the commerce data you want to extract. Squarespace offers per-API scopes such as Orders, Inventory, Products, Contacts, and Transactions, available as read-only (and read-write where applicable). Grant read access for the resources this source should sync.

setupSteps.title: Copy and store the key
setupSteps.body: Record the generated key immediately. Squarespace shows the key value only once at creation time and will not display it again. Store it securely for use as the connector credential.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the generated key in the api_key field and set start_date to the earliest date from which records should be synced. Both fields are required.

sources.title: Squarespace Commerce APIs - Authentication and permissions
